name: Chocolate Teacake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cocoa.
3. Cream the butter, then add the vanilla and sugar. Beat until light, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the egg, then add the dry ingredients in three additions, alternating with the buttermilk.
5. Do not over mix. Stir in the chopped pecans.
6. Pour into a greased and floured 7-by-5-by-3-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove and cool on a rack.
